title: Whimscape Better Elytra Color
description: An (unofficial) add-on pack for Whimscape that changes the color of the Elytra to make it more Suitable!
body:
- Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) _for his resource pack_ Whimscape

> [![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab30d3739908c7958f04d056f509c2482950f73.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)


# This pack retextures the Elytra of Whimscape to make it look like it was found on the End Ship
